nasb.text: For this is the one referred to by Isaiah the prophet when he said, “The voice of one crying in the wilderness, ‘Make ready the way of the Lord, Make His paths straight!’ ”

esv.text: For this is he who was spoken of by the prophet Isaiah when he said, “The voice of one crying in the wilderness: ‘Prepare the way of the Lord; make his paths straight.’”

cnv.text: 以賽亞先知所說： “在曠野有呼喊者的聲音： ‘預備主的道， 修直他的路！’” 就是指著這約翰說的。

ccb.text: 约翰就是以赛亚先知所说的那位，他说：“有人在旷野大声呼喊，‘预备主的道，修直祂的路。’”

csbs.text: 这约翰就是藉着先知以赛亚所说的那个人。以赛亚说： “在旷野有声音呼喊着： ‘你们当预备主的道， 当修直    他的路！’”
